config.script:
try:
		# Get all the parameters we need to save
		site_id 			= self.view.params.site_id
		line_id 			= self.view.params.line_id
		edit				= self.view.params.edit
				
		type_id				= self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("GeneralContainer").getChild("Type_Dropdown").props.value
		line_name			= self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("GeneralContainer").getChild("Line_Entry").props.text
		line_material		= self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("GeneralContainer").getChild("Material_Tag").props.params.selectedTag
		line_desc			= self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("GeneralContainer").getChild("Description_Entry").props.text
		line_weight_min 	= float(self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("GeneralContainer").getChild("Min_Entry").props.text)
		line_weight_max 	= float(self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("GeneralContainer").getChild("Max_Entry").props.text)
		starr_unit_id 		= self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("GeneralContainer").getChild("STARR_Unit").props.value
		
		metal_reject_tag 		= self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("RejectsContainer").getChild("MetalRejectTag").props.params.selectedTag
		metal_reject_tag_type 	= self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("RejectsContainer").getChild("MetalRejectTagType").props.value
		metal_test_tag 			= self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("RejectsContainer").getChild("MetalTestTag").props.params.selectedTag
		metal_test_tag_type 	= self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("RejectsContainer").getChild("MetalTestTagType").props.value
		weight_reject_tag 		= self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("RejectsContainer").getChild("WeightRejectTag").props.params.selectedTag
		weight_reject_tag_type 	= self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("RejectsContainer").getChild("WeightRejectTagType").props.value
		exclude_out_of_range	= self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("RejectsContainer").getChild("ExcludeOutOfRange").props.selected
		assume_weight_rejects	= self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("RejectsContainer").getChild("AssumeWeightRejects").props.selected
		
		shifts_per_day	= self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("ShiftsContainer").getChild("ShiftsPerDay").props.value
		shift_length 	= self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("ShiftsContainer").getChild("ShiftLength").props.value
		shift_start 	= self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("ShiftsContainer").getChild("ShiftStart").props.value
		
		# Do some validation...make sure everything has been entered correctly
		
		namedQuery = "Weight_Q/DB_Scalar/Count_Line"
		parameters = {
			'type_id':			type_id, 
			'site_id':			site_id, 
			'line_name':		line_name
		}
		
		exists = system.db.runNamedQuery(system.project.getProjectName(), namedQuery, parameters)
		
		
		if exists > 0 and edit == False:
			CORE_P.Utils.errorPopup('A line with that name already exists under the selected type and site.') 
			return
				
		
		txId = system.db.beginTransaction(timeout=5000)


	
		if edit == False:
	
			namedQuery = "Weight_Q/DB_Insert/Insert_Line"
			parameters = {
				'type_id':				type_id, 
				'site_id':				site_id, 
				'line_name':			line_name, 
				'line_desc':			line_desc, 
				'line_weight_min':		line_weight_min, 
				'line_weight_max':		line_weight_max,  
				'line_material':		line_material,
				'starr_unit_id':		starr_unit_id,
				'metal_reject_tag':		metal_reject_tag,
				'metal_reject_tag_type':	metal_reject_tag_type,
				'metal_test_tag':		metal_test_tag,
				'metal_test_tag_type':	metal_test_tag_type,
				'weight_reject_tag':	weight_reject_tag,
				'weight_reject_tag_type':	weight_reject_tag_type,
				'exclude_out_of_range':	exclude_out_of_range,
				'assume_weight_rejects':assume_weight_rejects,
				'shifts_per_day':		shifts_per_day,
				'shift_length':			shift_length,
				'shift_start':			shift_start
			}
			
		else:
		
			namedQuery = "Weight_Q/DB_Update/Update_Line"
			parameters = {
				'type_id':				type_id, 
				'site_id':				site_id, 
				'line_name':			line_name, 
				'line_material':		line_material,
				'line_desc':			line_desc, 
				'line_weight_min':		line_weight_min, 
				'line_weight_max':		line_weight_max, 
				'line_id':				self.view.params.line_id,
				'starr_unit_id':		starr_unit_id,
				'metal_reject_tag':		metal_reject_tag,
				'metal_reject_tag_type':	metal_reject_tag_type,
				'metal_test_tag':		metal_test_tag,
				'metal_test_tag_type':	metal_test_tag_type,
				'weight_reject_tag':	weight_reject_tag,
				'weight_reject_tag_type':	weight_reject_tag_type,
				'exclude_out_of_range':	exclude_out_of_range,
				'assume_weight_rejects':assume_weight_rejects,
				'shifts_per_day':		shifts_per_day,
				'shift_length':			shift_length,
				'shift_start':			shift_start
			}
			
		affected_rows = system.db.runNamedQuery(system.project.getProjectName(), namedQuery, parameters,tx=txId)
		
		message =  'Added/Edited new packaging line:' + str(parameters)
		
		# Audit log
		CORE_P.Utils.logChanges(self, 
                     'AddEditPackagingLine',
                     message, 
                     txId=txId,
                     site_id=site_id,
                    )
		system.db.commitTransaction(txId)
                        			
		# Update the table with lines 
		system.perspective.sendMessage("update_bindings", payload = {}, scope = "page")

		CORE_P.Utils.showSuccess(self, "Saved!") 
		
		system.perspective.closePopup('')

	except:
		system.db.rollbackTransaction(txId)
		CORE_P.Utils.errorPopup('Error adding/editing Packaging Line:' + str(namedQuery)) #  + str(sys.exc_info())

# Get all the parameters we need to delete
	
	line_id 		= self.view.params.line_id
	site_id			= self.view.params.site_id

	txId = system.db.beginTransaction(timeout=5000)

	try:

		namedQuery = "Weight_Q/DB_Delete/Delete_Line"
		parameters = {
			'line_id':			line_id
		}
			

		affected_rows = system.db.runNamedQuery(system.project.getProjectName(), namedQuery, parameters,tx=txId)
		
		message =  'Deleted packaging line:' + str(parameters)
		
		# Audit log
		CORE_P.Utils.logChanges(self, 
                     'DeletePackagingLine',
                     message, 
                     txId=txId,
                     site_id=site_id,
                    )
		system.db.commitTransaction(txId)
                        			
		# Update the table with lines 
		system.perspective.sendMessage("update_bindings", payload = {}, scope = "page")

		CORE_P.Utils.showSuccess(self, "Deleted!") 
		
		self.props.value=0
		
		system.perspective.closePopup('')

	except:
		system.db.rollbackTransaction(txId)
		self.props.value=0
		CORE_P.Utils.errorPopup('Error deleting Packaging Line:') #  + str(sys.exc_info())

custom.help_text:
Line Min and Max Weight is only used for fixing the scale on the y axis of the daily charts.

Set these accrodingly to the minimum and maximum weight values you expect to see.

props.placeholder: Enter Maximum Weight For Fixed Scale
Enter Minimum Weight For Fixed Scale

props.text: (use EITHER a Material tag, OR select a STARR unit to get the Material of the latest Run state from)

transforms.code:
# Format and sort the names 
	formatted_names = sorted([{"value": item["type_id"], "label": item["type_name"]} for item in value],key=lambda x: x['label'].lower())
	return formatted_names
